content:
IVX HOLDINGS — FINAL OWNER SIGN-IN STABILIZATION AND DIAGNOSTIC BANNER REMOVAL

This screenshot is from the real installed Expo app.

Current verified failures:

1. Developer diagnostics banner is visible at the top.
2. Owner AI returns:
   no_supabase_session
3. Git SHA displays:
   local
4. API environment displays:
   unknown

Previous reports claiming completion do not override this real-device evidence.

Fix this exact installed Expo React Native application end to end.

==================================================
TASK 1 — REMOVE THE TOP DIAGNOSTIC BANNER
==================================================

The large Version / Git SHA / Build time / API env / Bundle / Watchdog panel must not appear automatically in production.

Required behavior:

- Hidden by default in production
- Never overlays chat content
- Never pushes the page down
- Never covers buttons
- Available only through:
  Owner Control
  → Diagnostics
  → Build Information

Add a developer-only guard:

- Show automatically only in development builds
- In production, require owner authentication and an explicit tap
- Add a Close button
- Persist closed state
- Do not reopen after app restart unless the owner opens it manually

Do not delete diagnostics functionality. Move it into the Owner Diagnostics drawer.

==================================================
TASK 2 — FIX OWNER SESSION PERMANENTLY
==================================================

Current error:

Owner session required
(no_supabase_session)

Audit every owner authentication root:

1. Manual email/password login
2. Passwordless owner login
3. Existing persisted session
4. Session restore after app restart
5. Refresh-token renewal
6. Expired access token
7. Supabase initialization
8. AsyncStorage or SecureStore persistence
9. App background and resume
10. Network reconnect
11. Logout
12. Owner AI request authorization
13. Owner route authorization
14. Expo Go session handling
15. EAS APK session handling

Required flow:

App launch
→ initialize Supabase client
→ load persisted session
→ validate session
→ refresh if required
→ load owner profile and role
→ verify owner authorization
→ enable Owner AI

Do not allow Owner AI to show “Assistant ready” while no valid owner session exists.

Instead:

- Show Sign in as Owner
- Open owner login directly
- After successful login, return automatically to Owner AI
- Retry the original owner request once
- Do not require the owner to repeat the message

==================================================
TASK 3 — USE ONE SUPABASE CLIENT
==================================================

Search the full Expo project for duplicate Supabase clients.

There must be one shared production client only.

Verify:

- One Supabase URL source
- One anonymous-key source
- One session-storage adapter
- autoRefreshToken enabled
- persistSession enabled
- detectSessionInUrl configured correctly for native
- No client recreated during component render
- No separate owner-AI Supabase client
- No stale local client
- No mock client in production

All authentication, chat, Owner AI and owner routes must use the same session source.

==================================================
TASK 4 — FIX BUILD ENVIRONMENT IDENTIFICATION
==================================================

Current diagnostics incorrectly show:

Git SHA: local
API env: unknown

For every Expo Go and EAS build, inject and display:

- App version
- versionCode
- Git commit SHA
- Build timestamp
- Environment: development / staging / production
- API base URL name, without exposing secrets
- Supabase project identifier, redacted
- EAS project ID, redacted
- Build profile

Production APK must never show:

- Git SHA: local
- API env: unknown

If these values are missing, fail the production build instead of creating an unidentified APK.

==================================================
TASK 5 — OWNER AUTHORIZATION
==================================================

After Supabase session restoration, verify the authenticated user is the IVX owner.

Use server-side role verification.

Required responses:

- No session: 401
- Valid session but not owner: 403
- Valid owner session: 200
- Server failure: 500 with traceId

Do not convert missing sessions into generic AI timeout errors.

Return the owner-login screen immediately when the session is absent.

==================================================
TASK 6 — PREVENT SESSION RACE CONDITIONS
==================================================

The Owner AI screen must wait for auth initialization before enabling send actions.

Use explicit states:

AUTH_INITIALIZING
SIGNED_OUT
SESSION_REFRESHING
SIGNED_IN_MEMBER
SIGNED_IN_OWNER
AUTH_ERROR

Rules:

- Disable Owner AI send button during AUTH_INITIALIZING
- Do not send Owner AI requests before SIGNED_IN_OWNER
- Do not show “Assistant ready” before SIGNED_IN_OWNER
- Do not start watchdog timers before authentication succeeds
- Cancel active requests when the owner logs out
- Do not restore a stale owner session after logout

==================================================
TASK 7 — REAL DEVICE TEST MATRIX
==================================================

Test on the exact Expo app and final APK:

1. Fresh install
2. First owner login
3. Close and reopen app
4. Force-stop and reopen
5. Restart phone
6. Wi-Fi to 5G switch
7. 5G to Wi-Fi switch
8. Airplane mode and recovery
9. Access-token expiration
10. Refresh-token renewal
11. Logout and login again
12. Owner AI message immediately after login
13. Owner AI message after app restart
14. Owner AI message after background/resume
15. Member account denied from Owner AI
16. Diagnostic banner remains hidden
17. Diagnostics drawer opens manually
18. Correct Git SHA displayed
19. Correct API environment displayed
20. No no_supabase_session error after valid login

==================================================
TASK 8 — AUTOMATED TESTS
==================================================

Add and run:

- Supabase client singleton tests
- Session-persistence tests
- Session-refresh tests
- Owner-role tests
- App-restart tests
- Auth-initialization race tests
- Owner AI authorization tests
- Diagnostics visibility tests
- Production environment-variable tests
- Expo Go and EAS configuration tests

No skipped critical tests.

==================================================
TASK 9 — BUILD AND DEPLOY
==================================================

Use the existing approved Expo app only.

Package:

com.ivxholdings.app

Do not create another app or package.

Build with a new versionCode.

Verify:

GitHub HEAD
=
Render live SHA
=
/version SHA
=
APK embedded SHA

Generate the final Expo APK and provide a direct downloadable artifact.

==================================================
FINAL EVIDENCE
==================================================

Return only:

1. Root cause of no_supabase_session
2. Duplicate Supabase clients found
3. Files changed
4. Authentication flow before and after
5. Diagnostic banner location before and after
6. Tests passed and failed
7. Git commit SHA
8. Render deployment ID
9. /health result
10. /version result
11. APK embedded SHA
12. APK filename
13. Direct APK attachment or HTTPS URL
14. Real-device owner login result
15. Real-device Owner AI result
16. Remaining issues

FINAL ACCEPTANCE

Complete only when:

- The top diagnostic banner is hidden in production
- Diagnostics remain available inside Owner Control
- Owner session restores after restart
- Owner AI recognizes the restored owner session
- no_supabase_session no longer appears after valid owner login
- Git SHA is not “local”
- API environment is not “unknown”
- Owner AI send button is disabled until authentication is ready
- The final APK uses com.ivxholdings.app
- Real Android testing passes

Do not return another “100% verified” report without testing this exact installed build.
